message:
feat(beads): Enhanced HTML export redesign plan with complete details

Added/Updated beads:

NEW TASKS:
- ehsd: Task 6.5 - Create test fixtures for all agent formats
- 1v5c: Task 3.5 - Implement popover JavaScript in scripts.rs

ENHANCED EXISTING TASKS:
- x399: Task 1 - Added MessageGroupType enum, ToolCallWithResult for correlation
- 1c6z: Task 2 - Multi-agent format support (Claude, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode)
- 27t2: Task 3 - Overflow handling (+N more badges), full accessibility (ARIA)
- ab1y: Task 5 - Popover CSS, print styles, high contrast mode
- 3cmm: Task 6 - Multi-format tests, performance tests, logging tests
- 2ebr: Task 7 - Comprehensive E2E test cases

DEPENDENCY GRAPH:
x399 (data structures)
  └── 1c6z (grouping algorithm)
      └── 27t2 (renderer)
          └── 1v5c (popover JS)
              ├── 1nk5 (integration)
              └── ab1y (styling)
                  └── 2ebr (E2E tests) [also needs ehsd]
                      └── 1ihb (final validation)

ehsd (fixtures) ─┬─> 3cmm (unit tests)
                 └─> 2ebr (E2E tests)

READY TO START:
- x399: Task 1 - MessageGroup data structure
- ehsd: Task 6.5 - Test fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
